description: A naval architect is finalizing the DARPA SUBOFF submarine model and needs to add aft control surfaces. OpenVSP is already running with the baseline hull loaded (/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/SUBOFF_baseline.vsp3). Read the specification document on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/suboff_tail_spec.txt). Then, add a new Wing component for the tail fins, position it at the specified X-location, set its span to the required value, and use the Symmetry (Sym) tab to configure a 4-fin cruciform layout using Rotational (Axial) symmetry instead of the default Planar symmetry. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/SUBOFF_cruciform.vsp3.
